caption: Dropping equipment off at Hemlock after I close up. U12 kids are gonna run me into the ground. Still on for FIFA tonight?
yeah hit me up when you're back. already ordered pizza lol
should be home by 7:30. don't expect me to be sharp after chasing 12-year-olds around for an hour
excuses before we even start 😂
Brake job before and after on a '15 Silverado. Rotors were done. Drive safe out there, Dearborn.
Chevelle primer coat went on clean this weekend. She's starting to look like something.
Eagles took the field this morning at Hemlock. 3-1 win. Proud of these kids.
New diagnostic scanner earning its keep. Phantom electrical fault, found in 20 minutes.
Sunday Chevelle session. Springsteen on the shop speaker, coffee going cold. Perfect.
Timing belt and water pump on a Camry. Preventive beats a tow every time.
U-12 passing drills tonight. Half of them finally trapping the ball. Progress.
Firdale parts delivery in. Brake pads stocked for the week's jobs.
Rebuilt the front brakes on the shop van. 2003 E-350 still earning her keep.
Dearborn Fall Festival setup. Hayes Auto Works proud to sponsor again this year.
Free inspection day for single moms at the shop. Twelve cars, zero charge. Community first.
Chevelle SS getting new door panels. Slow money, good bones.
Transmission flush and filter on a high-mileage Accord. Runs like new.
Game day. Eagles vs Lincoln Park. Away turf, same intensity.
Coffee at Seven Oaks before opening the bay. 7:45, quiet shop, clean day ahead.
AC recharge season is here. Book early before the heat hits.
Sam's first solo transmission diagnosis. Kid's got it. Proud mentor moment.
Chevelle wheels mocked up. Not final but had to see it.
Serpentine belt squeal fixed. Two minutes, two dollars, one happy customer.
Eagles equipment bag restocked. New cones, new pinnies, same old whistle.
Oil change and inspection combo, our neighborhood special. In and out.
Robert supervising from the good chair. 40 years of knowing exactly what's wrong.
Ram 1500 in my own bay for once. Cobbler's kids and all that.
Alternator swap on a Malibu. Charging system back to spec.
BBQ prep for the crew. Ribs on low and slow since sunrise.
Chevelle engine bay cleaned up. Numbers-matching 454 waking up soon.
Wheel alignment on the rack. Straight steering, even tires, better mileage.
Eagles parents came through with the snack schedule. Team runs on orange slices.
Winter prep special going out this week. Battery, coolant, wipers, tires.
Late night on a fleet van. Sometimes the job just takes what it takes.
Chevelle grille test fit. Chrome's going to pop against the red.
New customer from the Yelp review found us. Word of mouth still wins.
Spark plugs and coils on a misfiring F-150. Smooth idle restored.
Practice under the lights at Hemlock. Cold night, warm effort.
Shop floor swept, tools racked, invoices sent. That's a wrap on the week.
Chevelle interior stripped to metal. The therapy nobody prescribed but everybody needs.
Caliper and rotor combo on a CR-V. Stopping power back where it belongs.
Community festival car show lineup forming. Bring your builds, Dearborn.
Fuel pump replacement on a stranded Impala. Back on the road same day.
Sunday rec league with Dearborn FC. Legs are 30, heart's still 18.
Radiator swap before the first freeze. Coolant's cheap, engines aren't.
Emily home for the weekend, running the shop's Instagram. Look at us, professional.
Diagnostic day. Three check-engine lights, three different stories.
Chevelle trunk pan patched and sealed. Rust doesn't sleep, but neither do I.
Eagles team photo day. Sixteen kids, one blurry group shot, all worth it.
Struts and mounts on a rough-riding Sentra. Smooth again.
Firdale bulk order landed the 12% discount. Small margins, smart moves.
Tigers game with Omar tonight. Shop closes on time for once.
Chevelle dash restored. Original gauges cleaned and working.
Winter tire swaps stacking up. Michigan doesn't ask nicely.
Head gasket job wrapped on a overheating Jeep. Big job, clean result.
Chevelle bumpers off to the chrome shop. Coming back like jewelry.
Eagles clinched a playoff spot. These kids earned every bit of it.
Power steering pump on a groaning Silverado. Quiet turns again.
Saturday's a full board. Six cars, two mechanics, one pot of coffee.
Chevelle floor pans welded in. Solid ground under her now.
Wheel bearing on a howling CR-V. Highway's peaceful again.
Team pancake breakfast fundraiser. Eagles parents are undefeated cooks.
EVAP leak on a Fusion, found the cracked purge line. Check engine light off.
Chevelle quarter panel test fit. Gap's tight, I'm happy.
Clutch replacement on a manual Civic. Save the manuals, people.
Frost on the windshields means winter package season. Book now.
Sam nailed the alignment specs solo today. Teaching pays off.
Chevelle vinyl top coming off. Forty years of Michigan under there.
Ball joints and tie rods on a wandering Escape. Tracks straight now.
Rec league goal today. Told you the legs still work, Omar.
Thermostat and coolant flush before the deep freeze. Cheap insurance.
Chevelle gauges lit up on the bench. She's got a heartbeat.
Cabin and engine air filters, the ten-minute favor your car thanks you for.
Festival banner up. Hayes Auto Works, proud Dearborn sponsor since day one.
Rear main seal on a leaky Ram. Messy job, dry driveway.
Emily posted this one, said my caption game needs work. She's right.
Coil pack misfire on a Sonata sorted. Smooth as new.
Chevelle trunk lid aligned. Every panel's a small victory.
Brake fluid flush day. Old fluid's the color of regret. New fluid's clarity.
Under-the-lights practice. Cold hands, hot drills, good team.
Serpentine and idler pulley on a squeaky Odyssey. Silence restored.
Chevelle console rebuilt. Original wood grain, cleaned and clear-coated.
Oil leak diagnosis, valve cover gasket this time. Clean and reseal.
Free inspections booked solid for the community day. Dearborn shows up.
CV axle replacement on a clicking Corolla. Turns quiet now.
Chevelle headliner going in. Tedious work, worth every staple.
Battery and terminal cleaning combo. Cold starts, no drama.
Away game convoy to Lincoln Park. Parents caravanning, kids hyped.
Water pump on a Traverse before it left us stranded. Preventive wins.
Chevelle emblems polished and set. Details make the build.
Exhaust flex pipe patch on a rattling Malibu. Quiet cruising again.
Shop lunch: Linda's leftovers beat any deli sandwich. Every time.
Winter tire mount and balance, twelve sets and counting this week.
Chevelle mock-up rolling on all fours. First time she's stood in years.
Throttle body clean on a stumbling Altima. Idle's steady now.
Eagles end-of-practice huddle. Sixteen kids, one team, one whistle.
Fuel injector service on a hesitating Edge. Throttle response back.
Chevelle paint samples taped to the fender. Cranberry red's winning.
Wiper motor and blades before the first snow. See the road, stay on it.
Tigers highlights on in the bay while I close up. Small good things.
Differential fluid service on a work truck. Neglected but not forgotten.
Chevelle wiring harness laid out. Somewhere in here is order.
Neighborhood regular's third car this year. Trust is the whole business.
End of the week. Floor's clean, bays are empty, Chevelle's waiting for Sunday.
